{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "ProcDump, a legitimate Sysinternals tool, was used to dump the memory of lsass.exe, a common technique for credential dumping. This activity was initiated by a suspicious parent process named 'winx64_payload.exe', further indicating malicious intent.",
  "indicators": [
    "procdump.exe",
    "lsass.exe",
    "credential dumping",
    "winx64_payload.exe",
    "C:\\Windows\\Temp"
  ]
}
